steps.title: Set equal ratios
steps.content:
The ratio $8$ to $4$ is equivalent to the ratio $40$ to $4k$, so:
$$\frac{8}{4}=\frac{40}{4k}$$
$$2=\frac{40}{4k}$$

steps.title: Solve for the constant
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by $4k$, then divide by $8$.
$$2(4k)=40$$
$$8k=40$$
$$k=5$$
The answer is B.
